tweets.text: These are cool! I think most companies will want to use them [re: OpenAI workspace agents in ChatGPT]
New workspace agents on cloud-hosted Codex harness. Connect to tools, recurring tasks, Slack integration — Easier than ever to bring agents to your work.
Judging AGI by how well it can mimic us is a category error. We should judge AGI by how well it learns to do things we didn't teach it.
Google's 8th generation TPU — 2-3x performance improvements. So excited for Gemini to leverage these!
This is the agent cloud era [re: Google Cloud CEO Thomas Kurian's Agentic Enterprise keynote at Cloud Next]
We want you to have a lot of AI! [confirming Codex remains on free and Plus plans]
